understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the + gem tile on the grid without landing on spikes, using at most 2 attempts and 50 turns per level across multiple levels
understanding.mechanics_understanding: MOVE_LEFT/RIGHT shifts horizontally then auto-falls (up or down) in current gravity until landing on solid tile, goal, or hazard; CLICK on x removes breakables to open paths (does not advance platform timers); spikes u/v instantly end run; UNDO reverts last action; corridor_scan and landing previews indicate safe passages and falls
